# env\_var\_is\_set

Check if an environment variable is set.


```
env_var_is_set(
    env_var: str,
) -> bool
```

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `env_var`\* | `str` | The name of the environment variable. |
